subcodes.first_line: O thou handmaid of God! In this day, to thank God for His bounties consisteth in possessing a radiant heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکرانه فیض رحمان در این اوان عبارت از نورانیت قلب و احساسات
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
